title: Dynamic query library with join, filter, sort, paginate composability
prompt: Build a mini query library `MyApp.QueryKit` with these functions, all composable via pipe: `new(schema)` (base query with `as: :root`), `filter/3` (field, op, value — op is :eq, :in, :gt, :lt), `join_scope/3` (adds a named-binding join — assoc atom + `as:` atom), `sort/3` (field, direction), `paginate/3` (limit, offset — pinned). Operators must compile via dynamic/2. Write a caller `MyApp.Accounts.Finder.find/1` that builds a search for active users in a specific team with name-ilike, sorted and paginated. Write to `lib/my_app/query_kit.ex` and `lib/my_app/accounts/finder.ex`.
tier_rationale: Full composable DSL across 5+ operations including operator dispatch, dynamic joins, and pagination. End-to-end exercise of the query-composition capability.
